field_changes.old: Enter meals faster with precise nutrition details. Just type or say what you ate, and MyNetDiary logs each food and portion. Quick and easy!
field_changes.new: New interactive multi-chart views of everything you track—nutrition, exercise, weight, and health. Explore suggested Timelines and customize them to discover what’s driving your results. See the big picture, then drill down to the details.
